description: Letter from Yosef b. Eli Kohen Fasi, from Busir to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. The writer deals with purchasing flax. He approves that he received coins but he cannot weigh them because he does not have a scale. Writes several instructions for payments. Expresses his opinion that the flax market in Busir is not in a good condition. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #401) VMR
description_he: מכתב מיוסף בן אלי כהן פאסי, מבוסיר, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, על רכישת פשתן ומצב שוק הפשתן בבוסיר
